Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-25 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum Ranker Today's data shows exceptional strength in precious metals and commodity-linked equities, with TNGX and PL dominating the momentum rankings. TNGX leads with a composite score of 97.6 and a staggering 1151% one-year return, though this represents an extreme outlier—its 69% monthly return and 152% quarterly return suggest either a micro-cap recovery or special situation. PL (Platinum) follows with an 818% one-year return and maintains more consistent ratio scaling across timeframes (3 out of 5 ratio passes vs TNGX's 4), indicating steadier accumulation rather than volatile spikes. Both tickers pass all four SMA gates (trading above their 30/50/100/200-day moving averages), confirming they're in established uptrends, though TNGX shows superior resilience on bad SPY days (0.38 vs PL's 2.81 bad-day score). The correlation patterns suggest these gains are largely decoupled from broad equity indices and driven by commodity/precious metals strength rather than tech momentum.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
